Chat Edit: 'I need you to set up the agentic autonomous win32 cli so it can take this "C:\Users\HiH8e\OneDrive\Desktop\PS Dlazy init ide cmake --build bui.txt"

and go thru them 1 by 1 to fix it, there are 7 agents/models that get deployed with it so there is no way they cant do it quicker than i can'

Chat Edit: 'I need you to set up the agentic autonomous win32 cli so it can take this "C:\Users\HiH8e\OneDrive\Desktop\PS Dlazy init ide cmake --build bui.txt"

and go thru them 1 by 1 to fix it, there are 7 agents/models that get deployed with it so there is no way they cant do it quicker than i can'
Chat Edit: 'Create a auto-fix that also can fix warnings as well just add another            under -AutoFix    -AutoWarnings'

Chat Edit: 'Can you reverse engineer that as well the auto including fix and warnings and see what else can be reverse engineered to have fixed automatically like this please that isnt fictional and include a single 1 liner that can do it all at once as well as invidivually target 


Also anyway to have this automatically choosen with whatever the right answer is supposed to be as I was unable to know what the requirement was to finish it so I simply ctrl+c it ->

'

Chat Edit: 'This needs to be auto fixed so it can find and change it as i dont want to see any warnings or errors here ever or linking errors

And also the swarm needs to have its own beaconism to the ESP which is the number name psjobtypename state hasmoredata location it also needs to show what its working on aka the name of the source file and then a timer next to it that shows the full amount of time they have been working that only runs when the agents are physically inside a piece of source coding not searching for the source to fix'

Chat Edit: 'add custom context "You are a ....."  and rules aka whatever you want to hook that has to be read by each agent before it even speaks
